title: Coleman Starre Kühlbox, 16 QT Performance, Hochleistungs-Kühlbox, 15 l, Kühlt bis zu 1 Tag
features: Lightweight portable cooler with performance insulation to keep contents fresh for up to 1 day maximum when food/beverages are refrigerated with ice cubes or freezing blocks.
Handle for one-handed transport. Ideal for long journeys, camping, sporting events, and transporting food and drinks.
Despite the thin walls, which creates more room for cooling goods, it has excellent stability. Keeps cold for 1 day.
For your safety, the inside of the cooler is BPA free and can therefore transport food, cold drinks and fruits safely (according to EN 12456).

Dimensions (ext./int.): 39 x 31 x 27 / 32 x 25 x 21 cm. Weight 2.5 kg. Material (ext./in.): High-density polyethylene (HDPE), BPA Free, insulated polyurethane (PU) foam. Capacity 15 litres. Ice retention: 1 day.
description: From the manufacturer About Us Heritage We share your passion. In 1901, a young man with a entrepreneur spirit and a great idea, started the production of lanterns in Wichita, Kansas (USA). Now and more than 100 years later, this spirit is still what guides Coleman. A company that started with a flash of inspiration. The Coleman brand has constantly innovated and evolved forever changing the way you enjoy the outdoors. Products excellence, innovation and experience. First and foremost our passion is the outdoors, therefore our source of innovation is inspired by what nature offers. Overall, our philosophy is to encourage you to enjoy various outdoor activities. Therefore, every year, we create a multitude of innovative products and introduce new ranges that will inspire you to explore the outside world. Whether you love to relax in your garden with friends or family, or your passion is exploring the Arctic in extreme conditions, we will have the right tools for every of your adventures in our extensive product range. A brand you can believe in, a confidence earned over the last 100 years. A promise of quality that has been strengthened over generations through our commitment to providing you with high quality products.
